title: Centered Inventory
description: This project centers the inventory even when the Recipe Book is enabled
body:
**Centered Inventory**

Ever notice how your inventory goes off-center when the Recipe Book is enabled?

![Off-centered inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f55e6a600e849eda079b067756d17c43cfc89fee_0.webp)

This mod fixes this issue! Just drop it into your Mods folder and your inventory will shift to the same position it was when the Recipe Book is closed.

![Centered Inventory!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/823609ade7e86f2a3e608bf961fa015babbffdde.png)

**Optional Dependencies**

[Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Not required, but allows enabling/disabling the mod via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). Alternatively, just edit `config/centered_inventory.json`

The idea for this mod came from a setting from the now-discontinued [Better Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb) that accomplished the same thing
